prestazioni: Replace the factory Rover-derived **TVR Speed Eight (AJP8) 5.0L V8** with a forged internals build featuring **JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression forged slugs**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Crower billet crankshaft** to handle 800+ hp reliably. Pair with **Titan Motorsport CNC-ported cylinder heads** and **Ferrea Racing 5000-series intake/exhaust valves** for optimized flow.

Install a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger** with a **custom TVR-specific intake manifold** (fabricated by **V8 Speed Shop**) and a **Vortech Max-Speed intercooler core** (front-mount, 4.5" thick) to push 12 psi of boost. Use a **Holley Dominator EFI system** with **Accel 85 lb/hr injectors** and a **MoTeC M150 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Upgrade the drivetrain with a **Quaife ATB differential** (TVR-specific 7.5" housing) and a **Tilton twin-plate ceramic clutch** (rated for 1,000 Nm). Replace the factory **Getrag 5-speed** with a **Tremec T56 Magnum XL** (TVR-specific bellhousing adapter by **G-Force Transmissions**) and a **Peloquin LSD** for improved torque transfer.
estetica: Fit a **RML Short Wheelbase (SWB) widebody conversion kit** (TVR-specific, +3" per side) with **custom carbon fiber fender flares** (hand-laid by **Fibreworks Composites**) to accommodate **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x9.5" (front) and 18x11" (rear) wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear)**.

Install a **TVR-specific Rocket Bunny V1 aero kit** (modified for Griffith 500 chassis) featuring a **carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards**, **side skirts with air curtains**, and a **ducktail rear spoiler** (adjustable angle via **AeroCatch mounts**). Paint in **TVR Racing Green (BS381C-224)** with **3M Matte Black vinyl accents** on the hood and roof.

Replace the factory interior with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (TVR-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather (Tan with Green stitching)** and **Alcantara suede headliner**. Add a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (quick-release hub) and a **custom roll cage** (TIG-welded by **Sparco Pro2000**) with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** for track use.
